markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review progress and align on strategy to improve user activation.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Templates Live:** `lovable.dev/templates` is live with 7 templates, but is hidden. It will be linked in the footer to enable initial discovery before a full public launch.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Urgent Security Threat:** A technical audit found 213 URLs flagged by Google as phishing. This is a critical risk that could result in a sitewide penalty and requires immediate action.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Activation Rate Declining:** The sign-up-to-activation rate is falling. The core problem is a lack of user intent data, which prevents effective onboarding and template development.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** A new hire (Joanna) will lead a project to gather user intent data (via surveys, session analysis, prompt analysis) to inform template creation and improve activation.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

## Topics

### User Activation & Intent Data

  - [**Problem:** The sign-up-to-activation rate is declining.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A lack of user intent data prevents effective onboarding and template development.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [**Solution:** Gather intent data to understand *who* users are and *what* they are trying to build.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Data Gathering Methods:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
      - [**Surveys:** Ask users about their goals during onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
      - [**Session Analysis:** Analyze user sessions to identify common workflows and pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [**Prompt Analysis:** Use AI to summarize user prompts and infer intent.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [**Onboarding Experiment:** Test asking intent questions during the first co-generation step to avoid blocking sign-up.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)

### Content & Template Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Increase content volume while maintaining quality.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [**New Hire Project:** Joanna will lead a project to gather use case data, focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [**B2B:** Sales tools (e.g., pipeline command centers, account research apps).](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [**Consumer:** Common website types (e.g., portfolios, blogs).](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
      - [**Engineers:** Investigate this large user segment's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Template Library:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [`lovable.dev/templates` is live with 7 templates.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**MVP:** No categories; all templates are general websites.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [**Next Batch:** 5 portfolio websites.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [**Future:** Add categories and filters as the library grows.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Editorial Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [8 articles published; 5 more by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [**Early Signal:** Competitive comparison articles are performing well → will be prioritized.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

### Technical Audit & Security Risk

  - [A technical audit identified a critical security risk.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Finding:** 213 URLs are flagged by Google as phishing or deceptive.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Risk:** Could result in a sitewide penalty from Google.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Action:** Ceci will send the list of URLs to Igor (security) for immediate takedown.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [Send an executive summary of work and wins to Ceci.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [Link `lovable.dev/templates` in the website footer.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Ceci:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [Send the list of 213 phishing URLs to Igor (security).](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Assign Joanna (new hire) to lead the user intent data project.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Lovable Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with user intent data (surveys, session analysis, prompt analysis) as it becomes available.](https://fathom.video/share/HMLzou4BkG5jECiJKF7NkRwVPN2d_LeL?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
